title: Use External Cache Stores for Shared Runtime State
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to ops-cache-store.
notes: Use an external cache store for shared runtime state, invalidation, or multi-instance deployments. In-memory cache is process-local.

title: Expose Health and Structured Logs for Workers
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to ops-health-logging.
incorrect:
// INCORRECT: Unstructured logs are hard to alert on or correlate.
console.log("job failed", error);
notes: Workers need structured logs, health checks, and lifecycle/shutdown handling for brokers, queues, databases, and cache dependencies.

title: Make Queue Jobs Idempotent and Retry-safe
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to ops-queue-idempotency.
notes: Queues usually provide at-least-once delivery. Make processors idempotent before external side effects such as email, payments, or webhooks.

title: Protect Scheduled Jobs in Multi-instance Deployments
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to ops-scheduler-locks.
notes: Cron jobs run in each process. Use one worker instance, distributed locks, or leader election for side-effectful scheduled work.

title: Inherit Global App Config in Hybrid Microservices
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to transport-hybrid-config.
notes: Hybrid apps need an explicit decision about global pipes, guards, filters, and interceptors. Use `inheritAppConfig: true` when the transport should share the HTTP app policy.

title: Use Transport-aware Exceptions in Message Handlers
prompt: Use $nestjs-workers-transports-ops to improve this code according to transport-microservice-errors.
notes: Microservice handlers and guards should use `RpcException` or transport-specific filters. HTTP exceptions are for HTTP controllers.
